jurisdiction: New York City, NY — New York City Council (governing body)

primary_source.system: Granicus Legistar (Legislative Management Suite) — NYC tenant
primary_source.how_to_enumerate_meetings: HTML calendar: GET https://legistar.council.nyc.gov/Calendar.aspx — returns paginated list of all meetings with MeetingDetail.aspx?ID={id}&GUID={guid} links, filterable by year (1994–2029) and committee. API (with token): GET https://webapi.legistar.com/v1/nyc/events?token={token} for structured JSON; paginates via OData $top/$skip (max 1000/page). Token requested via form at https://council.nyc.gov/legislation/api/.
sample_document_urls: https://nyc.legistar.com/MeetingDetail.aspx?LEGID=21297&GID=61&G=2FD004F1-D85B-4588-A648-0A736C77D6E3 — Stated Meeting 12/19/2024, Final agenda+minutes, 121 items, video linked
https://legistar.council.nyc.gov/Calendar.aspx — live calendar covering sessions from 1994 to 2026-2029 current
https://legistar.council.nyc.gov/Legislation.aspx — full legislation index (Introductions, Resolutions, Local Laws, Hearing Transcripts back to 1994)

second_source.system: NYC Open Data — Socrata dataset 'Council Committees And Meetings' (dataset ID: m48u-yjt8)
second_source.what_it_affirms: An independently-published, queryable Socrata export of meeting metadata — event_id, committee name, meeting_date, meeting_time, meeting_location, agenda_status, minutes_status, modified_date, and a URL back to the Legistar MeetingDetail page. Verified live: returns JSON rows confirming e.g. event_id=21297, 'City Council', 2024-12-19, agenda_status='Final', minutes_status='Final'. Provides independent confirmation of meeting dates, committee assignments, and agenda/minutes finalization status. Coverage confirmed through at least December 2024. A separate Socrata dataset (uvw5-9znb, 'City Council Members 1999 to Present', last updated April 10 2026) provides member roster data.

votes_located: Per-item action results (aggregate outcome) appear directly in the Legistar HTML meeting detail page. Confirmed quote from Meeting ID 21297 (12/19/2024 Stated Meeting, 121 items): table columns show 'Action' = 'Approved by Council' and 'Result' = 'Pass' for each legislation row. Per-member roll-call votes (how each council member voted) are accessible via the Legistar API at https://webapi.legistar.com/v1/nyc/eventitems/{eventItemId}/votes?token={token} — per Granicus documentation the endpoint returns the vote tally using the EventItem ID returned from matter histories. Each meeting detail page also carries a 'HistoryDetail.aspx?ID={historyId}' popup link per item (ID example: 32307670 from the 12/19/2024 meeting), though those pages require session context from the parent page and returned 410 when fetched standalone.

systems_surveyed.era_covered: Session 1994–present (current session 2026–2029); committee hearings, Stated Meetings, all committee types

systems_surveyed.status: 200 OK — Stated Meeting 12/19/2024 fully loaded with 121 items, Final minutes, agenda PDF, hearing transcript, video link
systems_surveyed.era_covered: Same as primary domain; used by older Socrata dataset URLs

systems_surveyed.status: 403 Token is required — confirms NYC IS a valid Legistar tenant; token freely obtainable via form at https://council.nyc.gov/legislation/api/
systems_surveyed.era_covered: Same as HTML; OData-based JSON API for bodies, events, matters, event items, votes, persons

systems_surveyed.system: NYC Open Data (Socrata) — Council Committees And Meetings dataset m48u-yjt8
systems_surveyed.status: 200 OK — returns live JSON; most recent finalized records through December 2024
systems_surveyed.era_covered: Covers multiple years of meeting records; latest confirmed meeting: 2024-12-19

systems_surveyed.system: NYC Open Data (Socrata) — City Council Members 1999 to Present (uvw5-9znb)
systems_surveyed.status: 200 OK — last updated April 10 2026; 558 rows covering member terms 1999–present
410 Gone when fetched standalone — this is an AJAX modal launched from the MeetingDetail page; requires parent page session context
systems_surveyed.era_covered: N/A — per-item; standalone access not available

systems_surveyed.status: Not probed — NYC confirmed as Legistar tenant, no need to probe PrimeGov

access_constraints: 1. Legistar API (webapi.legistar.com/v1/nyc): Requires a bearer token. Token is publicly obtainable at no cost by submitting a form at https://council.nyc.gov/legislation/api/ — confirmed by NYC Council's own API page. Passed as URL parameter: ?token={token}. API responses capped at 1,000 records per page (use OData $top/$skip to paginate). 2. Legistar HTML interface (legistar.council.nyc.gov and nyc.legistar.com): Fully public, no authentication required. 3. NYC Open Data Socrata (data.cityofnewyork.us): Fully public, no authentication required for read access. SODA API also available without key. 4. HistoryDetail popup pages cannot be fetched standalone (410); per-member votes must be retrieved via the Legistar API votes endpoint.
open_questions: Per-member roll-call votes via the HTML route: the HistoryDetail.aspx popup returned 410 standalone — it is unclear whether any public HTML page renders per-member votes without the API token. This should be verified by loading the HistoryDetail within the parent MeetingDetail page session in a browser.

The NYC Open Data 'Council Committees And Meetings' dataset (m48u-yjt8) appears to have last been updated through December 2024 — it may have a lag or may not cover the current 2026 session. The refresh cadence and owner should be confirmed.

The Socrata dataset does NOT contain vote-level data (how individual members voted) — it is meeting-level metadata only. A dedicated vote-by-member dataset on NYC Open Data was not found; per-member votes appear to only be available via the Legistar API (token required).

Two Legistar domains coexist: legistar.council.nyc.gov (newer, canonical) and nyc.legistar.com (older, still live). The Socrata dataset URLs point to the older domain. Whether the older domain will eventually be deprecated is unknown.

NYC City Record (data.cityofnewyork.us/City-Government/City-Record-Online/dg92-zbpx) publishes public hearing notices and may serve as an additional cross-reference for scheduled meetings, but was not fully verified as a vote source.
